block_00: Take a look at the top news of the week
block_03: The total value of all cryptocurrencies in the market decreased by 2.2% over the past 24 hours, bringing the overall market capitalization to $1.03 trillion. The amount of trading activity also lessened, with a 6.4% decrease in trading volume to $52.7 billion. Meanwhile, bitcoin is up by 36% in the last month – seems like a good time to trade before the trend is over.
block_07: Tesla announced a much better than anticipated Q4 net income on Wednesday. The electric car manufacturer reported a record net income and earnings per share of $1.19, which was far better than the estimated $1.13 a share that analysts had predicted. The share price has risen 23% this week.
block_10: The company declared that they would be laying off thousands of employees ahead of a worsening economic situation, as the ongoing trend of corporate downsizing has now extended to firms that had been growing rapidly. Following the announcement, IBM shares fell 6%in one week.
